items.title: TempraMed Announces Strategic Agreement with Maccabi Healthcare Services, a Leading HMO with over 2.8 Million Patients
items.description: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - December 8, 2025) - TempraMed Technologies Ltd. (CSE: VIVI) ("TempraMed" or the "Company"), a medical technology innovator transforming how temperature-sensitive medications are stored and managed, is pleased to announce a major commercial milestone as part of its broader global expansion strategy: its flagship products, the VIVI Cap and VIVI EPI, are now available through Maccabi Healthcare Services, Israel's second-largest health maintenance...

items.title: Marvell Stock Is the Biggest Loser From Amazon’s New Chip. This Downgrade Proves It.
items.description: Benchmark Equity Research downgrades Marvell stock to Hold from Buy on a potential misread of Amazon.com business.

items.title: What to know about Paramount's hostile bid for Warner Bros. Discovery
items.description: Warner Bros. Discovery's friendly agreement to sell itself to Netflix just got upended by a hostile actor -- Paramount, which made Warner shareholders a higher offer and touched off what is likely to be a lengthy fight in the latest episode of media industry consolidation.  The bid comes after Warner last week agreed to be bought by Netflix for $72 billion.  Netflix’s vast library includes “Stranger Things” and “Squid Game," while the much smaller Paramount owns its Hollywood studio and major TV networks like CBS and MTV.

items.title: Trump approves Nvidia H200 chips for sale to China
items.description: The Trump administration will allow Nvidia to begin shipping its H200 chip to China.

items.title: How to Hedge AI-Heavy Portfolios Before the Bubble Pops (or Starts To Deflate)
items.description: Private credit, buyout funds, and direct investment strategies can temper tech bets if the market turns.
